allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Item AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, README.md -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, LinkType, Target | Format-Table -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "New-Item -ItemType SymbolicLink -Path 'F:/alicode/proj/dev-harness/.claude/__test_link.md' -Target 'F:/alicode/proj/dev-harness/CLAUDE.md' -Force | Out-Null; Get-Item 'F:/alicode/proj/dev-harness/.claude/__test_link.md' | Select-Object Name, LinkType")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Remove-Item 'F:/alicode/proj/dev-harness/.claude/__test_link.md','F:/alicode/proj/dev-harness/.claude/__test_transcript_pass.jsonl','F:/alicode/proj/dev-harness/.claude/__test_transcript_fail.jsonl','F:/alicode/proj/dev-harness/.claude/__debug.ps1' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem F:/alicode/proj/dev-harness/.claude/ -Force | Select-Object Name")
Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-ChildItem F:/alicode/proj/dev-harness/.claude/skills/ | Select-Object Name; Write-Host '---'; Test-Path F:/alicode/proj/dev-harness/skills")

PowerShell($item = Get-Item "F:\\alicode\\proj\\dev-harness\\CLAUDE.md" -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Name: $\($item.Name\)"; Write-Host "LinkType: $\($item.LinkType\)"; Write-Host "Attributes: $\($item.Attributes\)")

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\('F:\\alicode\\proj\\dev-harness\\init-ai-skills.ps1'\); if \($bytes[0] -eq 0xEF -and $bytes[1] -eq 0xBB -and $bytes[2] -eq 0xBF\) { Write-Host "UTF-8 BOM: YES" } else { Write-Host \("First 4 bytes: {0:X2} {1:X2} {2:X2} {3:X2}" -f $bytes[0], $bytes[1], $bytes[2], $bytes[3]\) })
